content.en:
"I didn't expect to break through to the eighth realm and have such a secret!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, he didn't need Taihao Golden Liquid, he was still ready to comprehend the rules of the three hundred and sixty-five dimensions before attacking the eighth realm.

However, he doesn't need the Eighth Realm, which doesn't mean that his relatives don't need to break through to the Eighth Realm in the future.

Moreover, the Purple Yun Realm Lord knows many secrets, and his strength is also extremely strong, so he is indeed a good partner to cooperate with.

If the Purple Yun Realm Lord could come up with enough Taihao Gold Liquid and other benefits, he really didn't mind cooperating.

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, do you have Taihao Gold Liquid in your hand?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There are indeed some, but not many!" said the Purple Yun Realm Lord, "If you are willing to cooperate, I can give you all this Taihao gold liquid, but I need you to do something." "

"What's the matter?"

Ye Tian had to ask clearly.

The Lord of the Purple Yun Realm said: "Although the Lord of the Poisonous Dragon Realm is a family of extradimensional creatures, it is a high-level member of the Ten Pyloric Sects, and the Ten Pyloric Sects destroyed the force I am in, the Tianyun Sect. So, I want you to help me get information about the Ten Pylorics. I've been here for too long, and I don't know much about the current situation of the Ten Pylorios. Remember, don't offend the Ten Pyloric Gates for the time being, the Ten Pyloric Gates are more than one Ninth Realm. -"

"There is more than one of the Ten Pyloric Sects, the Ninth Realm?"

Ye Tian was very surprised, this force was too powerful, the Purple Yun Realm Lord actually offended such a force.

However, since he chose to cooperate with the Purple Yun Realm Lord, he was naturally not afraid of the Ten Pyloric Sects.

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, what is the strength of the Ten Pyloric Sects, and what grade does it belong to in the Upper Domain?" Ye Tian asked.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord said: "The strength of the Ten Pyloric Sects is also extremely powerful in the Upper Domain, except for the nine multi-dimensional territories that occupy the top nine serial numbers, it can probably be ranked in the top thirty among the many Upper Domain forces, and our Tianyun Sect was originally ranked more than three hundred. "

"The Ten Pyloric Sects with multiple Ninth Realms are only ranked in the top thirty, and not counting those nine forces?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

How terrifying is the powerful power in this Upper Domain!

It can even be guessed that the nine forces that occupy the first nine multidimensional territories are the real giant forces, and no force dares to compete with them.

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, what is the strength of the forces that occupy the top nine multidimensional territories?" Ye Tian just asked curiously.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord shook his head, "I don't know, other multidimensional territories, even the one occupied by the Ten Pyloric Sects, are also allowed to outsiders to enter, after all, they also need to do business, and it is impossible to completely block the multidimensional territory where they are." However, the first nine multi-dimensional realms are very special, they are completely blocked, even the ninth realm cannot enter, and they are already beyond the upper domain. I only know that there was once a Ninth Realm from the Sixth Multidimensional Realm that directly destroyed a strength no less than the Ten Pyloric Sects, and the Ninth Realm in the outside world was killed by it in seconds, and the difference in strength was too great. Moreover, many treasure lands in the sixteenth to eighteenth dimensions have been occupied by them, and even the Taihao Golden Liquid, more than ninety out of five belong to them, how can other forces compete with these nine forces?"

Ye Tian nodded slightly, maybe the other forces felt desperate as long as they thought of those nine forces!

Moreover, these nine forces do not need to recruit talents from the outside world at all, even if they are strong in the ninth realm, if they want to join these nine forces, they are not qualified.

After that, Ye Tian and the Purple Yun Realm Lord discussed a lot of information about the Upper Domain, even if the information of the Purple Yun Realm Lord was a little backward, it was still not too bad.

Then, Ye Tian and the Purple Yun Realm Lord both made oaths, so that they could truly cooperate without worrying about betrayal.

"These Taihao gold liquids are for you!"

The Purple Yun Realm Lord directly took out the Taihao Gold Liquid and handed it to Ye Tian, since he wanted to cooperate, he had to be willing to take out the benefits, otherwise Ye Tian would not really help the Ziyun Realm Lord.

Other than that.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, if you cultivate the Primal Domain Body to the Dacheng Realm in the future, you can continue to cultivate a Dimensional Domain Body, but before the Primal Domain Body is completed, you must not cultivate the Second Dimensional Domain Body. "

The Purple Yun Realm Lord reminded.

"Why is that?"

Ye Tian didn't quite understand.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord explained: "Because after the Taichu Domain Body is promoted to the Dacheng Realm, the body can be considered stable and qualified to accommodate the second Dimensional Domain Body, otherwise if you forcibly cultivate the Second Dimensional Domain Body, your body will collapse." Of course, if you want to cultivate the third dimensional domain body, you must cultivate the first two dimensional domain bodies to the consummation realm, otherwise you can't cultivate. "

"Thank you Purple Yun Realm Lord for reminding me!"

Ye Tian said that he understood.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian left the Spell Spirit Gold Vein here, and then went to the first thousand realms in the Upper Domain.

Under normal circumstances, the sixth realm is not able to enter the first 1,000 realms, and even if you want to enter the first 2,000 territories, it is extremely difficult, you need a certificate or a strong person to take you there.

And Ye Tian naturally didn't need to be so troublesome, his strength was invincible in the seventh realm, and if he wanted to enter the top thousand territory from the thirteenth dimensional void, there was no problem, no one could stop him.

......

Wow!

Ye Tian tore through the barrier and successfully escaped from the thirteenth dimensional void into the Nine Hundred and Ninety-Nine Realm.

According to the introduction of the Purple Yun Realm Lord, this territory belongs to the hole cards of the two major forces of Taiyi Xuanlou and Ziqiong Alliance, both of which have the eighth realm, but there are only two or three eighth realms, but the number of the seventh realm is extremely large.

Compared with forces like the Purgatory Holy Sect and the Tianshu Sect, forces like Taiyi Xuanlou are undoubtedly extremely terrifying forces, but among the forces of the first thousand multidimensional realms, they are very ordinary.

Ye Tian first stayed in this multi-dimensional territory for a while, and inquired a little about the information, and the information he learned was not much different from the situation introduced by the Purple Yun Realm Lord, but after the Purple Yun Realm Lord hid in the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, several more forces were destroyed.

Of course, there are also a few forces that have actually risen and given birth to the existence of the Ninth Realm, and the strength of the forces has skyrocketed all of a sudden, with a higher status and more territory.

Ye Tian also learned about the Ten Pyloric Sects by the way, this force is still there, and the strength is even stronger, because the Ten Pyloric Sects gave birth to a Ninth Realm and occupied the territory of the Tianyun Sect.

He didn't inquire about the Poison Dragon Realm Master, otherwise he would have rashly inquired about a Ninth Realm, and the news would reach the ears of that Ninth Realm, and with a little deduction, he wouldn't be able to hide it from the other party.

His Thirty-Six Star Secret Technique had been cultivated to the limit, but he could only hide the deduction and tracking of the Eighth Realm, but he could not hide the Ninth Realm.

Unless, he can cultivate a better secret method.
